title: Signoff: Foundation (01 tree-sitter, 02 matching framework)
description:
Run /plan-work-completion-signoff on these docs:
- docs/plans/01-treesitter-integration.md → internal/parse/
- docs/plans/01-treesitter-integration-test-harness.md → internal/parse/ tests
- docs/plans/02-matching-framework.md → internal/eval/, internal/packs/
- docs/plans/02-matching-framework-test-harness.md → internal/eval/ tests, internal/testharness/

For each doc: read the plan thoroughly, compare every specified type/interface/function/algorithm against the actual code, run tests, then add a Completion Signoff section. Report gaps to dcg-scheduler.

comments.author: Danny Cosson
comments.text: Completed plan-work-completion-signoff pass. Docs updated with Completion Signoff sections and test verification. Commit: 59cdd70b3eafec9858716a3dde5ced0a32a9a177. Reported major plan-02 architecture gaps to scheduler (parse-driven matcher/envdetect/prefilter drift).
